calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for default judgment prove up hearing as to Defendant Uwe Guehnemann DBA Defco.

Dept.505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:07:50 a.m. and concluding at 10:22:30 a.m.(D505)

Patrick J. Whitehorn, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff CMA Development, Inc.
Defendant Uwe Guehnemann DBA Defco not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff Charles Ma was placed under oath.

Plaintiff's complaint for Contract/warrant filed May 2, 2023
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Uwe Guehnemann filed June 7, 2023
Default entered as to Defendant Uwe Guehnemann on July 11, 2023
Dismissal as to Defendants Does 1- 50 on August 18, 2023

Plaintiff's counsel addresses the issue of the notice of hearing and proof of service to the default defendant, and provides offer of proof.
With the provided argument from counsel, the Court is comfortable with moving forward with the hearing.

Plaintiff's counsel proceeds with summarizing the issues of the case and provides the court with proof .

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: agreement
Exhibit B: promissory note
Exhibit C: Interest calculations
Exhibit D: Proof of service of summons and complaint
Exhibit E: Entry of Default
Exhibit F: Costs
Exhibit G: dismissal of Doe Defendants

The Court confirms with the witness that declarations submitted and statements made are true and correct.

Based on the testimony provided and evidence presented, the plaintiff has proved their prima facie case, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff CMA Development Inc. and against Defendant Uwe Guehnemann DBA Defco as follows:

Damages $62,373.57
Attorney's Fees $8,527.50
Interest $1,447.41
Costs $789.70

Proposed judgment signed and executed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Continued To Jan-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
